task: Build the canonical FrankX agentic Obsidian second-brain guide and its architecture proof panel.
audience: Technical creators, founders, researchers, and AI operators adopting Obsidian with Claude Code or Codex
first_read: Build a local-first second brain in which the model is replaceable and the memory remains owned and recoverable.

references.label: Obsidian Help
references.reason: Official vault, linking, properties, templates, and product behavior

references.label: FrankX design system
references.reason: Editorial hierarchy, material restraint, and brand language

direction.signature: A three-layer system panel that separates the replaceable agent, the skills and MCP operating layer, and the durable Obsidian, Markdown, and Git substrate.

asset_quality.why_premium: The asset carries exact technical relationships and readable labels; a code-authored system panel is the correct evidence-bearing medium.

artifacts.notes: Inspected in the rendered guide at desktop and narrow viewport sizes.

checks.name: asset-tier
checks.evidence: Tier C is appropriate for an exact, text-bearing architecture panel.

checks.name: visual-qa
checks.evidence: Desktop and narrow captures show clear hierarchy, readable text, restrained depth, and no clipping.

checks.name: responsive-layout
checks.evidence: The three-stage architecture becomes a readable single-column flow on the narrow layout.

checks.name: accessibility
checks.evidence: Semantic figure and figcaption, real text instead of text in imagery, high contrast, and no motion dependency.

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.evidence: Actual localhost route captures were opened and visually inspected at both target sizes.

checks.name: asset-provenance
checks.evidence: No external or generated media was introduced; the system panel is owned code.

score.notes: First read, brand fit, exact architecture, typography, responsive composition, and factual integrity meet the ship gate. Two points remain for future user-tested interaction or original product capture once a Starlight Second Brain product exists.

known_risks: The whole-site build remains blocked by the pre-existing AI_PROVIDER_META failure on /ai-architecture/prototypes; the changed files compile and type-check cleanly.
MCP projects and client configuration formats change quickly; the article requires quarterly source review.
